grades.expectation: Response covers multiple CQS practice areas (governance, client care, training, file management, cyber security)
grades.reason: Comprehensive coverage including governance (section 2), client care (section 5), training (section 10), file management (section 1), and cyber security (section 9)

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific evidence types needed (e.g. training records, complaints log, SRO details)
grades.reason: Extensive specific evidence lists including training records, complaints register, CQS Responsible Officer details, and many others throughout

grades.expectation: Response references the Senior Responsible Officer (SRO) requirement
grades.reason: References 'Named CQS Responsible Officer' in section 2 and again in governance documents section

grades.expectation: Response mentions protocol compliance monitoring as a CQS requirement
grades.reason: While it covers CQS Core Practice Management Standards compliance, it doesn't specifically mention protocol compliance monitoring as a distinct requirement

grades.expectation: Response covers cyber security / IT security requirements
grades.reason: Dedicated section 9 on fraud prevention and cyber security with specific evidence requirements and policies

grades.expectation: Response mentions file management and supervision requirements
grades.reason: Section 1 comprehensively covers file handling and supervision with specific evidence requirements and common issues
